business_description.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania

coverages_discussed.notes: Premium shown is for 2024 prior insurance history. Policy number indicated as WC-KCB-2025-5580.

positives: Has a formal return-to-work or modified duty program
Maintains OSHA 300 logs and conducts regular job-site safety audits
concerns: No written contracts with all subcontractors
Does not require certificates of insurance from all subcontractors before work begins
No hold-harmless agreements obtained from all subcontractors
Hazardous materials used or encountered in operations
Prior policy cancellation by Zurich Insurance Group in 2022
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 13 claims in 2024, 10 claims in 2023, 4 claims in 2022. Cancellation by Zurich Insurance Group in 2022.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: Commercial Lines Supplemental Application for Keystone Commercial Builders, Inc., a general contractor operating in Western Pennsylvania.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program in place. Formal return-to-work or modified duty program exists. Applicant maintains OSHA 300 logs and conducts regular job-site safety audits.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Loss history shows 13 claims in 2024 with Nationwide Insurance, 10 claims in 2023 with Berkshire Hathaway Guard, and 4 claims in 2022 with Zurich Insurance Group. A cancellation occurred in 2022.
